headline: Johnson & Johnson PFA Launch Puts VARIPULSE Pro And Valuation In Focus
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) has launched its VARIPULSE Pro pulsed field ablation system in Europe following CE Mark approval. The system is aimed at faster, potentially more efficient cardiac ablation procedures, with real world evidence now being collected through a multi center study. Initial clinical use is underway, supported by live demonstrations and plans to share interim results at major medical conferences. For Johnson & Johnson, the VARIPULSE Pro rollout adds another device to...
